response.overview: Three men, each an embodiment of freedom, gather at the Snubbing Post. Situated on ancient trade routes, the Post welcomes all its evanescent patrons. Follow their journey to brotherhood transcendentally articulated through the genius of Johann Sebastian Bach. Freedom Renegade is a score of visceral movement that arrests the inner narrative and enchants audiences to a realm of sublime beauty while serenely awakening agency.
response.tagline: Music of J.S Bach, visceral movement and sublime beauty collide... Awaken your inner agency.
response.title: Freedom Renegade
